text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle is about more than just eating well and staying active. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, gives your body the energy it needs. Exercise, whether a daily walk or a gym session, strengthens your heart and muscles. However, many people forget the importance of sleep. Getting seven to nine hours each night helps your body repair and your mind stay sharp. Equally crucial is looking after your mental health. Managing stress through hobbies or meditation, and finding a good work-life balance, can prevent burnout. By caring for both your body and mind, you create a foundation for long-term wellbeing.
